dashboard_recap.headline: MLB Daily Recap - May 11, 2026
dashboard_recap.article:
"Guardians Deliver Thrashing to Angels, Yankees Fall to Orioles"

The Cleveland Guardians dominated the Los Angeles Angels 7-2, behind a strong team effort on the mound. Joey Cantillo led the way with 6.0 innings of one-run ball, striking out 4 and walking just 1. Meanwhile, Travis Bazzana drove in 2 runs on a single, while Vaughn Grissom's sharp line drive single scored the go-ahead run.

In other action, the Baltimore Orioles edged the New York Yankees 3-2, thanks in part to Coby Mayo's 3-RBI homer. Ryan Weathers pitched 6.1 strong innings for the Orioles, fanning 9 and surrendering 2 earned runs. The Tampa Bay Rays also picked up a win, taking down the Toronto Blue Jays 8-5 behind Andrés Giménez's 5-RBI performance, including 2 home runs.

all_games.top_pitching_line: Joey Cantillo: 6.0 IP, 4 K, 0 ER, 1 BB, 5 H
all_games.top_batting_line: Travis Bazzana: 1 H, 0 HR, 2 RBI, 2 AB
all_games.summary: The Cleveland Guardians dominated the Los Angeles Angels 7-2 behind Joey Cantillo's 6 shutout innings and Travis Bazzana's 2 RBI performance.

all_games.top_pitching_line: Ryan Weathers: 6.1 IP, 9 K, 2 ER, 3 BB, 1 H
all_games.top_batting_line: Coby Mayo: 1 H, 1 HR, 3 RBI, 2 AB
all_games.summary: The Baltimore Orioles edged the New York Yankees 3-2 behind Coby Mayo's 1-for-2 performance with a 3-RBI homer and Ryan Weathers' 6.1 innings with 9 strikeouts.

all_games.summary: The Arizona Diamondbacks edged the Texas Rangers 1-0 behind Michael Soroka's 6.1 scoreless innings and Geraldo Perdomo's go-ahead double.

all_games.summary: The Seattle Mariners edged the Houston Astros 3-1, led by Julio Rodríguez's 2 hits, including a home run, and George Kirby's 5 strong innings with 7 strikeouts.

all_games.summary: The San Francisco Giants defeated the Los Angeles Dodgers 9-3 behind a strong performance from their offense, led by Rafael Devers' 2 hits and 2 RBI.
